name: ingest
description: Read FASTA + SMILES + config; canonicalize identifiers

name: triage
description: Pre-docking biological triage with 5 rules (R1 length / R2 SP clip / R3 nTM / R4 dock-region length / R5 functional class)

name: structure_pred
description: AlphaFold 2/3 structure prediction or AW1_ref reuse

name: pocket_detect
description: Binding pocket detection or AW1_ref P2Rank reuse

name: ligand_prep
description: SMILES to 3D SDF with ETKDGv3 + MMFF

name: interaction
description: Bio.PDB contact extraction (5 A) + optional PLIP profiling

name: aggregate
description: z-score composite ranking and many-to-many matrix assembly

name: visualize
description: py3Dmol HTML + ChimeraX cxc generation; replay-mode placeholder when no docked SDF

name: manifest
description: Tool versions + SHA256 checksums + access dates
